scripts.migrate:reset: npx dotenv-cli -e .env -- prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed --schema=libs/prisma/user/schema.prisma && npx dotenv-cli -e .env -- prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed --schema=libs/prisma/wallet/schema.prisma
scripts.migrate:dev: npx dotenv-cli -e .env -- prisma migrate dev --schema=libs/prisma/user/schema.prisma && npx dotenv-cli -e .env -- prisma migrate dev --schema=libs/prisma/wallet/schema.prisma
scripts.generate: npx dotenv-cli -e .env -- prisma generate --schema=libs/prisma/user/schema.prisma && npx dotenv-cli -e .env -- prisma generate --schema=libs/prisma/wallet/schema.prisma
